name: Lord Broadmane
description_en: Broadmane was a duplicitous Noxian lord with little to his name but he had a pilfered Kashuri gauntlet, that charmed an audience of Ionians. He was killed by Jhin.
description_fr: Broadmane était un seigneur noxien fourbe qui n'avait pas grand chose à son actif, mais il possédait un gantelet Kashuri volé, qui charmait un public d'Ioniens. Il a été tué par Jhin.
